mapper.select: SELECT AVG(CASE WHEN sentiment_label = 'POSITIVE' THEN 1.0 WHEN sentiment_label = 'NEGATIVE' THEN -1.0 ELSE 0 END) FROM video_comment
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM analysis_task WHERE status = 'COMPLETED'
SELECT sentiment_label, COUNT(*) as count FROM video_comment GROUP BY sentiment_label
SELECT aspect, COUNT(*) as count FROM video_comment WHERE aspect != '' AND aspect IS NOT NULL GROUP BY aspect ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT DATE(created_at) as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM analysis_task WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY date ASC
